14],[406,522,1776531113629],[405,522,1776531113638],[404,523,1776531113650],[403,524,1776531113667],[402,525,1776531113691],[402,526,1776531113696],[402,526,1776531113841],[401,526,1776531113856],[397,525,1776531113872],[388,523,1776531113886],[374,521,1776531113897],[358,520,1776531113909],[341,519,1776531113921],[328,519,1776531113935],[318,519,1776531113945],[314,519,1776531113961],[313,519,1776531113979],[313,519,1776531113989],[314,518,1776531113997],[315,517,1776531114022],[316,517,1776531114050],[316,516,1776531114060],[317,516,1776531114071],[317,515,1776531114083],[318,515,1776531114097],[318,514,1776531114107],[317,514,1776531114155],[316,514,1776531114197],[315,514,1776531114224],[314,514,1776531114249],[314,515,1776531114274],[313,516,1776531114280],[312,516,1776531114295],[311,517,1776531114301],[311,518,1776531114314]],"mm-mp":18.365714285714287,"md":[[319,515,1776531114137]],"md-mp":3560.75,"mu":[[319,515,1776531114261]],"mu-mp":3575.0},"v":1,"tc":{}}
